title: Cathartolinum salsoloides
taxonomy: Cathartolinum salsoloides is classified in the family Amaranthaceae. It belongs to the order Caryophyllales. The genus Cathartolinum is part of the family Amaranthaceae. This classification is based on the plant's characteristics and its phylogenetic relationships with other plants. Cathartolinum salsoloides is also known to be a member of the infraclass Core eudicotyledons.
